Dr. Shailya Gupta is a board-certified dermatologist dedicated to helping millions achieve healthy skin through evidence-based medical and aesthetic care.

Meet Your Doctor

With an MBBS and MD in Dermatology, Dr. Shailya combines years of clinical expertise with a passion for public health education. Based in Pune, she serves patients both in-clinic and globally through digital consultations.


MD – Dermatology, Venereology & Leprosy

MBBS - Manipal Academy of Higher Education

Skin & Hair Specialist (Pimpri, Pune)

Patient Philosophy

"Skincare is not just about vanity; it's about the health of the body's largest organ. My mission is to simplify dermatology and make science-backed routines accessible to everyone."


- Dr. Shailya Gupta

Clinical Specialties

Medical Skincare

Specialized treatments for Acne, Pigmentation, Psoriasis, and Eczema.

Hair Restoration

Advanced therapies for Hair Fall, Thinning, and Scalp health management.

Aesthetics

Anti-aging solutions, Chemical Peels, and Glow-enhancing clinical procedures.

Dr. Shailya Gupta

Expert Dermatological Care | Pune, Maharashtra
